description: The Republic of Ireland's Health Service Executive (HSE) has approved rituximab in combination with gemcitabine and oxaliplatin for reimbursement as a treatment option for the treatment of relapsed or refractory CD20 positive diffuse large B cell lymphoma in patients ineligible for stem cell transplant.

contributions.description: Adding HSE approvals for reimbursement to database

contributor.name: Van Allen lab
contributor.description: Van Allen lab, Dana-Farber Cancer Institute

reportedIn.name: R-Gemcitabine (1000mg/m2) Oxaliplatin Therapy - 14 day. NCCP National SACT Regimen. HSE.
